title: night's Hypixel SkyBlock Enchanted Books
description: Custom textures for the various Enchanted Books and Book Modifiers that exist within Hypixel SkyBlock.
body:
# About
This is a resource pack that adds unique textures to each custom Enchanted Book in [Hypixel's SkyBlock](https://wiki.hypixel.net/Introduction) gamemode. Each book is outlined in the color of its [rarity](https://wiki.hypixel.net/Rarity), and specifies what the enchantment's level is. 

![Gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z3mvPSZb/images/f902902672d408e22ec93006f77399c111d4f973.gif)

# Dependencies
This resource pack currently requires either one of the following mods to function. In the future it will be vanilla compatible.
- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)
- [Catharsis](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis)

# More Information
- You can join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/M7HqWKxDxS) for notifications about future updates.
- The original release can be found on Hypixel's Forums [here](https://hypixel.net/threads/enchanted-book-overlays-for-skyblock-v4-4-new-foraging-enchants-firmament-mod-support.4026138/).
